title: lichen-gateway: review tracing spans and structured fields
description: rust/lichen-gateway uses tracing well but could benefit from review: ensure error! includes error context, use spans for request lifecycle, add metrics-friendly fields (bytes, latency_us) where useful.
close_reason: Gateway logging is well-structured with tracing spans and fields. Minor polish: per-packet logs (TX done, RX frame, mesh↔upstream) could be debug! for high-traffic. Low priority.
